seoTitle: Use AI to Auto-Reply to Google Reviews in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to set up AI-powered auto-replies for new Google reviews in GoHighLevel to manage your online reputation faster.
intro: Responding to every Google review manually takes time you might not have. This tutorial shows how to configure GoHighLevel's AI features to automatically reply to new Google reviews, helping you stay responsive without the manual effort.

steps.heading: Set up GoHighLevel for review management
steps.body: Make sure your Google Business listing is connected to GoHighLevel so reviews can be tracked and responded to.

steps.heading: Customize your auto-reply messages
steps.body: Configure message templates for different types of feedback, such as positive and negative reviews.

steps.heading: Enable AI-driven responses
steps.body: Turn on the AI feature so new reviews trigger a personalized automated reply based on your configured settings.

steps.heading: Monitor and adjust over time
steps.body: Check in on how your auto-replies are performing and adjust the messaging to keep it authentic and effective.

faq.question: Can I review AI-generated replies before they're posted?
faq.answer: Depending on your configuration, you can often set the system to require approval or let it post automatically.

faq.question: Does the AI handle negative reviews differently than positive ones?
faq.answer: Yes, you can typically customize different reply templates or tones for different types of feedback.

faq.question: Will auto-replying to reviews look impersonal to customers?
faq.answer: It can if messages aren't customized, so it's worth tailoring templates so they still feel genuine and specific.

faq.question: Is this feature limited to Google reviews only?
faq.answer: This particular workflow is focused on Google reviews, though GoHighLevel may support similar automation for other review platforms.
